extraction.one_line_summary: ASGREEN Kasper attacked at 4.8km after Deceuninck-QuickStep controlled with 7 riders, isolating FØNDERPO and VAN AERT despite being numerically weaker.
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck-QuickStep used all 7 riders in team time trial before Taaiegemberg, orchestrating splits to burn rivals numerically.
ASGREEN attacked at 4.8km despite being domestique all day, exploiting hesitation when rivals expected freshest riders to move.
VAN AERT and FØNDERPO isolated despite superior form when 3 QuickStep riders sat in final 7-man group.
Pre-Paterberg attacks by WVA-FØNDERPO neutralized by having LAMPAERT and VAN BAARLE bridge, not chase.

rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: positive: Won after full domestique duties suggests exceptional diesel engine for 200km+ attrition races.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Failed to convert Paterberg attack despite FØNDERPO partnership, suggesting tactical inflexibility against numerical disadvantage.
rider_signals.FØNDERPO Matteo: negative: Dropped move at 4.8km despite being marked as strongest rider, indicating vulnerability to repeated accelerations after 190km.
rider_signals.VAN AVERMAET Greg: neutral: Present in final 7 but no punch in finale, confirming post-peak status but still positioning ability.
rider_signals.LAMPAERT Yves: positive: Bridged to WVA-FØNDERPO move rather than chasing, key tactical nuance that kept QuickStep numbers up.
